what_happened: Prompt clinician to document physical red flags ruled out before psychiatric attribution.
product_or_system_implication: Prompt clinician to document physical red flags ruled out before psychiatric attribution.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Cross-specialty referral map
what_happened: Suggest adjacent specialties and shared handoff summary for unresolved patterns.
product_or_system_implication: Suggest adjacent specialties and shared handoff summary for unresolved patterns.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
condition_or_issue: Unexpected significant finding or critical imaging detail
finding_or_quote_or_case: Imaging finding lifecycle tracker
what_happened: Track from report to clinician acknowledgment, patient notification, referral, and closure.
product_or_system_implication: Track from report to clinician acknowledgment, patient notification, referral, and closure.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
condition_or_issue: Chest pain, torsion symptoms, sepsis signs, focal deficits
finding_or_quote_or_case: Emergency pathway timers
what_happened: Condition-specific timers/checklists for serial ECG/troponin, ultrasound, CXR, CTA/perfusion.
product_or_system_implication: Condition-specific timers/checklists for serial ECG/troponin, ultrasound, CXR, CTA/perfusion.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Low-resource diagnostic availability layer
what_happened: Capture test unavailability, alternate plan, referral, and supply-chain alert.
product_or_system_implication: Capture test unavailability, alternate plan, referral, and supply-chain alert.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
condition_or_issue: Stopped medication due to cost, adherence barriers, device/supply issues
finding_or_quote_or_case: Medication/access-as-diagnostic-clue
what_happened: Surface medication interruption as a risk factor for emergency differentials.
product_or_system_implication: Surface medication interruption as a risk factor for emergency differentials.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
condition_or_issue: Test ordered but not resulted before discharge
finding_or_quote_or_case: Pending-test discharge contract
what_happened: Patient-facing and clinician-facing list of pending results, expected date, owner, and action plan.
product_or_system_implication: Patient-facing and clinician-facing list of pending results, expected date, owner, and action plan.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Access/insurance/payment and community-care pathways affect whether testing begins.
what_happened: High-risk history and persistent symptoms never enter a stable diagnostic pathway.
what_was_missed_or_identified: High-risk history and persistent symptoms never enter a stable diagnostic pathway.
product_or_system_implication: Community intake + access-risk flags + incomplete-workup registry.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Key context such as family history, recent discharge, or repeat visit may not be visible.
what_happened: A return visit can look like a new isolated encounter.
what_was_missed_or_identified: A return visit can look like a new isolated encounter.
product_or_system_implication: Front-door repeat-visit banner and family-history prompt.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Abnormal vitals exist but are not integrated into diagnosis.
what_happened: Tachycardia, tachypnea, oxygen saturation, neuro deficits lose salience.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Tachycardia, tachypnea, oxygen saturation, neuro deficits lose salience.
product_or_system_implication: Triage risk model with forced reassessment when vitals worsen or repeat visits occur.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: First plausible diagnosis closes the case.
what_happened: Anxiety/asthma/gastroenteritis/seizure/COVID labels hide alternatives.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Anxiety/asthma/gastroenteritis/seizure/COVID labels hide alternatives.
product_or_system_implication: Diagnostic time-out: 'what would be dangerous to miss?' with condition-specific prompts.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Family history, medication access, and symptom timeline are not integrated.
what_happened: Cost-related medication interruption or autoimmune/cancer family history is treated as background.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Cost-related medication interruption or autoimmune/cancer family history is treated as background.
product_or_system_implication: Structured risk-context capture linked to decision support.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Time-sensitive exams can be absent or delayed.
what_happened: Abdominal/testicular signs and evolving pain are not escalated fast enough.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Abdominal/testicular signs and evolving pain are not escalated fast enough.
product_or_system_implication: Complaint-linked exam checklist and timer for torsion/appendicitis pathways.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Right lab is not ordered, or ordered but not matched to presentation.
what_happened: CRP, thyroid tests, antibody results, RDT/microscopy availability.
what_was_missed_or_identified: CRP, thyroid tests, antibody results, RDT/microscopy availability.
product_or_system_implication: Order-set suggestions and stockout-aware alternatives.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Wrong imaging, no imaging, or limited anatomic scope.
what_happened: Thoracic abscess missed by lumbar MRI; no CXR; no CTA/perfusion; delayed ultrasound.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Thoracic abscess missed by lumbar MRI; no CXR; no CTA/perfusion; delayed ultrasound.
product_or_system_implication: Imaging scope/rule-out warning and emergency pathway trigger.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Abnormal result exists but severity/action is not communicated.
what_happened: Right-heart strain, Listeria, AChR antibody, echo vegetation, unexpected radiology finding.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Right-heart strain, Listeria, AChR antibody, echo vegetation, unexpected radiology finding.
product_or_system_implication: Critical semantics + acknowledgment + action tracking.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Pending results and uncertainty disappear from the patient plan.
what_happened: Patient leaves before critical information returns or before serial tests are done.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Patient leaves before critical information returns or before serial tests are done.
product_or_system_implication: Discharge plan must list pending tests, owner, date, escalation route, and patient-facing meaning.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Referral is needed but not made, delayed, wrong, or abandoned after poor interaction.
what_happened: Specialty handoff does not happen or patient drops out after negative encounter.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Specialty handoff does not happen or patient drops out after negative encounter.
product_or_system_implication: Referral closure tracking plus patient experience/escalation feedback loop.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Return visits do not cause diagnostic reset.
what_happened: The system repeats the same explanation despite worsening signals.
what_was_missed_or_identified: The system repeats the same explanation despite worsening signals.
product_or_system_implication: Repeat-visit diagnostic reset requiring a new differential and review of prior notes/results.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Specialist sees one slice, remote note, or wrong chart.
what_happened: Wrong patient chart, remote stroke decision, specialty assumptions.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Wrong patient chart, remote stroke decision, specialty assumptions.
product_or_system_implication: Identity verification, red-flag checklist, and cross-specialty summary pane.

package_topic: Research B / missed signals and diagnostic errors
finding_or_quote_or_case: Slow trends and chronic invalidation hide deterioration.
what_happened: Anemia trend, repeated admissions, persistent symptoms, nutrition decline.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Anemia trend, repeated admissions, persistent symptoms, nutrition decline.
product_or_system_implication: Trend explorer with unresolved-problem list and functional status/quality-of-life metrics.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: High EHR alert load was linked with clinicians reporting missed abnormal results.
what_happened: PCPs received many alerts and reported overload, poor usability, and handoff problems.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Abnormal results could be missed or delayed.
product_or_system_implication: Risk-ranked result inbox with owner, severity, patient-notified status, and escalation.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
patient_stage_or_process_step: first assessment / history / exam / tests / referral
finding_or_quote_or_case: Reviewed diagnostic-error cases showed breakdowns across history, exam, testing, referral, and tracking.
what_happened: 190 diagnostic-error cases were reviewed using EHR-based triggers.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Common diseases could be missed, including pneumonia, heart failure, renal failure, cancer, UTI/pyelonephritis.
product_or_system_implication: Return-visit flags, diagnostic checklist, and tracking for common high-harm misses.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
condition_or_issue: complex patients and limited English proficiency
finding_or_quote_or_case: Clinicians often needed more time than allotted.
what_happened: Time pressure was especially high with complex psychosocial needs and limited English proficiency.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Subtle red flags or context could be missed.
product_or_system_implication: Previsit narrative capture and interpreter/social-complexity preparation.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Safety-netting plans varied in specificity and responsibility.
what_happened: GPs used monitoring, treatment, and administrative risk strategies.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Worsening symptoms may not be acted on without a clear plan.
product_or_system_implication: Safety-net plan with red flags, timescale, responsible clinician, and follow-up trigger.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
condition_or_issue: severe back pain after prior breast cancer
finding_or_quote_or_case: Multiple contacts over eight months preceded diagnosis of spinal metastatic cancer.
what_happened: Back pain was treated and later investigated after spinal lump was found.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Repeat unresolving symptom and prior cancer history were not connected early.
product_or_system_implication: Unresolved-symptom timeline and prior cancer/history surfacing.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
condition_or_issue: worsening skin lesion with prior skin cancer
finding_or_quote_or_case: A second online request lacked prior cancer history and was triaged as routine.
what_happened: Later GP review generated an urgent referral.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Prior cancer history and deterioration were not joined in the online triage step.
product_or_system_implication: Online intake should auto-surface major history and related recent contacts.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Online forms can lose nuance when they force single-symptom routes or depend on free text.
what_happened: HSSIB described risks in both structured and free-text intake.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Complexity and patient meaning may be missed.
product_or_system_implication: Hybrid intake: narrative, adaptive red flags, prior-history auto-pull, complexity escape hatch.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
condition_or_issue: stroke, MI, aortic dissection, spinal cord compression, VTE, meningitis, sepsis, etc.
finding_or_quote_or_case: Serious ED diagnostic harms concentrated in a set of high-risk conditions.
what_happened: A systematic review identified high-risk conditions and presentation patterns.
what_was_missed_or_identified: High-risk disease behind common symptoms can be missed.
product_or_system_implication: High-risk diagnosis overlays by symptom, repeat visit, vitals, and risk factors.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Commentary argued ED misdiagnosis should be understood in the broader system of crowding and safety risk.
what_happened: AHRQ ED diagnostic-error framing was critiqued.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Diagnostic attention and follow-up may degrade under crowding.
product_or_system_implication: Crowding-aware diagnostic review triggers and workload dashboards.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Triage nurses reported pressure, cognitive strain, and emotional strain during acuity decisions.
what_happened: Interviews identified training, experience, culture, and strain as decision factors.
what_was_missed_or_identified: High-risk patients may be under-triaged.
product_or_system_implication: Triage co-pilot with red flags, reassessment timers, and escalation support.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Staff fatigue contributes directly and indirectly to patient harm but is not routinely captured.
what_happened: HSSIB gathered staff accounts and safety-system findings.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Attentional lapses, communication problems, or task omissions can be missed.
product_or_system_implication: Fatigue-aware task routing and second-check triggers for high-risk diagnostic tasks.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
setting_or_context: referral hospitals: ED, ICU, wards, maternity
finding_or_quote_or_case: Poor handover communication was linked to documentation, training, procedure, and culture barriers.
what_happened: Qualitative interviews described communication barriers during handovers.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Diagnosis, medications, treatment changes, and pending tasks may be missed.
product_or_system_implication: Standardized handoff object with diagnosis, uncertainty, pending tests, watch-outs, and next owner.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Communication gaps remained despite EHR diffusion.
what_happened: Survey identified persistent PCP-specialist communication gaps.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Specialist feedback or PCP clinical question may not connect.
product_or_system_implication: Referral object with clinical question, urgency, attachments, consultant response, next owner.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Closed diagnostic referral loops remain a safety problem.
what_happened: Systems-engineering analysis described failures and redesign approaches.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Specialist evaluation or test may be missed.
product_or_system_implication: Closed-loop referral tracker with due dates and exception handling.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Enhanced usability and longitudinal tracking lowered cognitive workload and improved abnormal-result management.
what_happened: Simulation compared EHR designs.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Abnormal results can be lost in poor interfaces.
product_or_system_implication: Longitudinal test-trend view and task-state tracking.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Long and redundant notes can obscure important information.
what_happened: Review/commentary described note growth and redundancy.
what_was_missed_or_identified: New facts, changed assessment, and unresolved problems may be hidden.
product_or_system_implication: Note-diff, copied-forward detection, concise problem timeline.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Difficult patient behavior negatively affected diagnostic performance in experiments.
what_happened: Physicians reviewed vignettes with disruptive behaviors.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Correct diagnosis behind behavior could be missed.
product_or_system_implication: Bias-aware diagnostic pause when stigmatizing labels or difficult interactions appear.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
condition_or_issue: physical symptoms in patients with mental illness
finding_or_quote_or_case: Physical symptoms may be misattributed to mental illness.
what_happened: Qualitative study explored diagnostic overshadowing and ED challenges.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Physical illness can be missed when symptoms are attributed to psychiatric causes.
product_or_system_implication: Medical red-flag checklist for mental-health presentations and vitals/baseline trend display.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: CHWs reported barriers to early cancer detection and referral.
what_happened: Qualitative study identified training, infrastructure, referral, fear, finance, and sociocultural barriers.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Early cancer signs and referral completion may be missed.
product_or_system_implication: CHW decision support, local-language education, referral navigation, follow-up queue.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
patient_stage_or_process_step: labs ordered / imaging ordered / public screening
finding_or_quote_or_case: Large global diagnostic-access gap limits confirmation and monitoring.
what_happened: Lancet Commission summary documented inadequate access to diagnostics.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Conditions may remain unconfirmed or unmonitored.
product_or_system_implication: Resource-aware workflows, point-of-care test inventory, offline referral escalation.

package_topic: Research D / clinician-side diagnostic pain points
finding_or_quote_or_case: Clinician commentary emphasized observing the actual clinician screen and workflow.
what_happened: Podcast/blog commentary discussed diagnostic-error reduction in ED.
what_was_missed_or_identified: Prior history, pending tests, and red flags may be scattered.
product_or_system_implication: Field observation and screen-level workflow mapping before designing tools.
